intended_use_full: AI Viewer is software for clinical review intended for use in General Radiology and other healthcare imaging applications. AI Viewer is intended to be used with off the shelf computing devices. AI Viewer supports major desktop browsers such as Microsoft Edge, Chrome, Safari. AI Viewer can display annotations and measurements as an overlay on images from DICOM objects, and from AI software. The viewer can perform 3D Multi-Planar Reformatting (MPR), 3D Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) and 3D Volume Rendering (VR). AI Viewer is purposed to aid in reviewing findings through its ability to display clinical documents and reports side by side with the images.
